@prefix fhir: <http://hl7.org/fhir/> .
@prefix owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#> .
@prefix rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#> .
@prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#> .
@prefix xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#> .

# - resource -------------------------------------------------------------------

 a fhir:CapabilityStatement ;
  fhir:nodeRole fhir:treeRoot ;
  fhir:id [ fhir:v "erp-fachdienst-server"] ; # 
  fhir:meta [
    ( fhir:profile [
fhir:v "https://gematik.de/fhir/erp/StructureDefinition/GEM_ERP_PR_CapabilityStatement|1.6"^^xsd:anyURI ;
fhir:l <https://gematik.de/fhir/erp/StructureDefinition/GEM_ERP_PR_CapabilityStatement?version=1.6>     ] )
  ] ; # 
  fhir:text [
fhir:status [ fhir:v "extensions" ] ;
fhir:div [ fhir:v "<div xmlns=\"http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml\"><p class=\"res-header-id\"><b>Generated Narrative: CapabilityStatement erp-fachdienst-server</b></p><a name=\"erp-fachdienst-server\"> </a><a name=\"hcerp-fachdienst-server\"> </a><div style=\"display: inline-block; background-color: #d9e0e7; padding: 6px; margin: 4px; border: 1px solid #8da1b4; border-radius: 5px; line-height: 60%\"><p style=\"margin-bottom: 0px\"/><p style=\"margin-bottom: 0px\">Profile: <a href=\"https://simplifier.net/resolve?scope=de.basisprofil.r4@1.5.4&amp;canonical=https://gematik.de/fhir/erp/StructureDefinition/GEM_ERP_PR_CapabilityStatement|1.6\">https://gematik.de/fhir/erp/StructureDefinition/GEM_ERP_PR_CapabilityStatement|1.6</a></p></div><h2 id=\"title\">ERP CapabilityStatement für den E-Rezept-Fachdienst</h2><ul><li>Implementation Guide Version: 1.0.0-draft </li><li>FHIR Version: 4.0.1 </li><li>Supported Formats: <code>application/fhir+json</code>, <code>application/fhir+xml</code></li><li>Published on: 2025-12-15 </li><li>Published by: gematik GmbH </li></ul><blockquote class=\"impl-note\"><p><strong>Note to Implementers: FHIR Capabilities</strong></p><p>Any FHIR capability may be 'allowed' by the system unless explicitly marked as 'SHALL NOT'. A few items are marked as MAY in the Implementation Guide to highlight their potential relevance to the use case.</p></blockquote><h2 id=\"rest\">FHIR RESTful Capabilities</h2><div class=\"panel panel-default\"><div class=\"panel-heading\"><h3 id=\"mode1\" class=\"panel-title\">Mode: <code>server</code></h3></div><div class=\"panel-body\"/></div><h3 id=\"resourcesCap1\">Capabilities by Resource/Profile</h3><h4 id=\"resourcesSummary1\">Summary</h4><p>The summary table lists the resources that are part of this configuration, and for each resource it lists:</p><ul><li>The relevant profiles (if any)</li><li>The interactions supported by each resource (<b><span class=\"bg-info\">R</span></b>ead, <b><span class=\"bg-info\">S</span></b>earch, <b><span class=\"bg-info\">U</span></b>pdate, and <b><span class=\"bg-info\">C</span></b>reate, are always shown, while <b><span class=\"bg-info\">VR</span></b>ead, <b><span class=\"bg-info\">P</span></b>atch, <b><span class=\"bg-info\">D</span></b>elete, <b><span class=\"bg-info\">H</span></b>istory on <b><span class=\"bg-info\">I</span></b>nstance, or <b><span class=\"bg-info\">H</span></b>istory on <b><span class=\"bg-info\">T</span></b>ype are only present if at least one of the resources has support for them.</li><li><span>The required, recommended, and some optional search parameters (if any). </span></li><li>The linked resources enabled for <code>_include</code></li><li>The other resources enabled for <code>_revinclude</code></li><li>The operations on the resource (if any)</li></ul><div class=\"table-responsive\"><table class=\"table table-condensed table-hover\"><thead><tr><th><b>Resource Type</b></th><th><b>Profile</b></th><th class=\"text-center\"><b title=\"GET a resource (read interaction)\">R</b></th><th class=\"text-center\"><b title=\"GET all set of resources of the type (search interaction)\">S</b></th><th class=\"text-center\"><b title=\"PUT a new resource version (update interaction)\">U</b></th><th class=\"text-center\"><b title=\"PATCH a new resource version (patch interaction)\">P</b></th><th class=\"text-center\"><b title=\"POST a new resource (create interaction)\">C</b></th><th class=\"text-center\"><b title=\"DELETE a resource (delete interaction)\">D</b></th><th><b title=\"Required and recommended search parameters\">Searches</b></th><th><code><b>_include</b></code></th><th><code><b>_revinclude</b></code></th><th><b>Operations</b></th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><a title=\"SHALL\"><b>Y</b></span></td><td class=\"text-center\"/><td/><td/><td/><td/></tr></tbody></table></div><hr/><div class=\"panel panel-default\"><div class=\"panel-heading\"><h4 id=\"Task1-1\" class=\"panel-title\"><span style=\"float: right;\">Resource Conformance: SHALL </span>Task</h4></div><div class=\"panel-body\"><div class=\"container\"><div class=\"row\"><div class=\"col-lg-4\"><span class=\"lead\">Core FHIR Resource</span><br/><a href=\"http://hl7.org/fhir/R4/task.html\">Task</a></div><div class=\"col-lg-4\"><span class=\"lead\">Reference Policy</span><br/></div><div class=\"col-lg-4\"><span class=\"lead\">Interaction summary</span><br/><ul><li><strong>SHALL</strong> support <code>search-type</code>, <code>read</code>, <code>patch</code>.</li></ul></div></div><p/><div class=\"row\"><div class=\"col-6\"><span class=\"lead\">Supported Profiles</span><p><a href=\"StructureDefinition-GEM-ERP-PR-Task.html\">GEM ERP PR Task</a></p></div></div><p/><div class=\"row\"><div class=\"col-lg-7\"><span class=\"lead\">Search Parameters</span><table class=\"table table-condensed table-hover\"><thead><tr><th>Conformance</th><th>Parameter</th><th>Type</th><th>Documentation</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><b>SHALL</b></td><td><a href=\"http://hl7.org/fhir/R4/task.html#search\">authored-on</a></td><td><code>date</code></td><td><div><p>Task.authoredOn - Unterstützt die Suche nach dem Erstellungsdatum; default sort if _sort is not provided</p>\n</div></td></tr><tr><td><b>SHALL</b></td><td><a href=\"http://hl7.org/fhir/R4/task.html#search\">status</a></td><td><code>token</code></td><td><div><p>Task.status - Unterstützt die Suche nach dem Status einer Task</p>\n</div></td></tr><tr><td><b>SHALL</b></td><td><a href=\"SearchParameter-task-expiry-date-sp.html\">expiry-date</a></td><td><code>date</code></td><td><div><p>Task.extension:expiryDate.valueDate - Unterstützt die Suche nach dem Verfallsdatum</p>\n</div></td></tr><tr><td><b>SHALL</b></td><td><a href=\"SearchParameter-task-accept-date-sp.html\">accept-date</a></td><td><code>date</code></td><td><div><p>Task.extension:acceptDate.valueDate - Unterstützt die Suche nach dem Akzeptanzdatum</p>\n</div></td></tr><tr><td><b>SHALL</b></td><td><a href=\"http://hl7.org/fhir/R4/task.html#search\">modified</a></td><td><code>date</code></td><td><div><p>Task.lastModified - Unterstützt die Suche nach dem zuletzt modifizierten Datum</p>\n</div></td></tr><tr><td><b>SHALL</b></td><td>_sort</td><td><code>string</code></td><td><div><p>Unterstützt das Sortieren nach unterstützten Task-Suchkriterien</p>\n</div></td></tr><tr><td><b>SHALL</b></td><td>_count</td><td><code>number</code></td><td><div><p>Maximale Anzahl zurückgegebener Einträge pro Seite; maximum value is 50</p>\n</div></td></tr><tr><td><b>SHALL</b></td><td>_offset</td><td><code>number</code></td><td><div><p>Nullbasierter Offset des ersten zurückgegebenen Eintrags; default is 0</p>\n</div></td></tr></tbody></table></div><div class=\"col-lg-5\"> </div></div><div class=\"row\"><div class=\"col-12\"><span class=\"lead\">Extended Operations</span><table class=\"table table-condensed table-hover\"><thead><tr><th>Conformance</th><th>Operation</th><th>Documentation</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><b>SHALL</b></td><td><a href=\"OperationDefinition-CreateOperation.html\">$create</a></td><td><div><p>Creates a Task for a specific flow type</p>\n</div></td></tr><tr><td><b>SHALL</b></td><td><a href=\"OperationDefinition-ActivateOperation.html\">$activate</a></td><td><div><p>Activates the created Task using the signed ePrescription bundle</p>\n</div></td></tr><tr><td><b>SHALL</b></td><td><a href=\"OperationDefinition-AcceptOperation.html\">$accept</a></td><td><div><p>Pharmacy claims an ePrescription and sets Task status to in-progress</p>\n</div></td></tr><tr><td><b>SHALL</b></td><td><a href=\"OperationDefinition-RejectOperation.html\">$reject</a></td><td><div><p>Rejects dispensing and resets Task status to active</p>\n</div></td></tr><tr><td><b>SHALL</b></td><td><a href=\"OperationDefinition-CloseOperation.html\">$close</a></td><td><div><p>Finishes the ePrescription workflow and sets Task status to completed</p>\n</div></td></tr><tr><td><b>SHALL</b></td><td><a href=\"OperationDefinition-AbortOperation.html\">$abort</a></td><td><div><p>Aborts the ePrescription workflow and deletes Task related data</p>\n</div></td></tr></tbody></table></div></div></div></div></div><div class=\"panel panel-default\"><div class=\"panel-heading\"><h4 id=\"ChargeItem1-2\" class=\"panel-title\"><span style=\"float: right;\">Resource Conformance: SHALL </span>ChargeItem</h4></div><div class=\"panel-body\"><div class=\"container\"><div class=\"row\"><div class=\"col-lg-4\"><span class=\"lead\">Core FHIR Resource</span><br/><a href=\"http://hl7.org/fhir/R4/chargeitem.html\">ChargeItem</a></div><div class=\"col-lg-4\"><span class=\"lead\">Reference Policy</span><br/></div><div class=\"col-lg-4\"><span class=\"lead\">Interaction summary</span><br/><ul><li><strong>SHALL</strong> support <code>search-type</code>, <code>read</code>, <code>create</code>, <code>update</code>, <code>patch</code>, <code>delete</code>.</li></ul></div></div><p/><p/><div class=\"row\"><div class=\"col-lg-7\"><span class=\"lead\">Search Parameters</span><table class=\"table table-condensed table-hover\"><thead><tr><th>Conformance</th><th>Parameter</th><th>Type</th><th>Documentation</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><b>SHALL</b></td><td><a href=\"http://hl7.org/fhir/R4/chargeitem.html#search\">entered-date</a></td><td><code>date</code></td><td><div><p>ChargeItem.enteredDate - Unterstützt die Suche nach dem Eingangsdatum; default sort if _sort is not provided</p>\n</div></td></tr><tr><td><b>SHALL</b></td><td><a href=\"http://hl7.org/fhir/R4/resource.html#search\">_lastUpdated</a></td><td><code>date</code></td><td><div><p>ChargeItem.meta.lastUpdated - Unterstützt die Suche nach dem zuletzt aktualisierten Datum</p>\n</div></td></tr><tr><td><b>SHALL</b></td><td>_sort</td><td><code>string</code></td><td><div><p>Unterstützt das Sortieren nach unterstützten ChargeItem-Suchkriterien</p>\n</div></td></tr><tr><td><b>SHALL</b></td><td>_count</td><td><code>number</code></td><td><div><p>Maximale Anzahl zurückgegebener Einträge pro Seite; maximum value is 50</p>\n</div></td></tr><tr><td><b>SHALL</b></td><td>_offset</td><td><code>number</code></td><td><div><p>Nullbasierter Offset des ersten zurückgegebenen Eintrags; default is 0</p>\n</div></td></tr></tbody></table></div><div class=\"col-lg-5\"> </div></div></div></div></div><div class=\"panel panel-default\"><div class=\"panel-heading\"><h4 id=\"Consent1-3\" class=\"panel-title\"><span style=\"float: right;\">Resource Conformance: SHALL </span>Consent</h4></div><div class=\"panel-body\"><div class=\"container\"><div class=\"row\"><div class=\"col-lg-4\"><span class=\"lead\">Core FHIR Resource</span><br/><a href=\"http://hl7.org/fhir/R4/consent.html\">Consent</a></div><div class=\"col-lg-4\"><span class=\"lead\">Reference Policy</span><br/></div><div class=\"col-lg-4\"><span class=\"lead\">Interaction summary</span><br/><ul><li><strong>SHALL</strong> support <code>search-type</code>, <code>create</code>, <code>delete</code>.</li></ul></div></div><p/><p/><div class=\"row\"><div class=\"col-lg-7\"><span class=\"lead\">Search Parameters</span><table class=\"table table-condensed table-hover\"><thead><tr><th>Conformance</th><th>Parameter</th><th>Type</th><th>Documentation</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><b>SHALL</b></td><td><a href=\"http://hl7.org/fhir/R4/consent.html#search\">category</a></td><td><code>token</code></td><td><div><p>Consent.category - Unterstützt die Suche nach der Art der Einwilligung</p>\n</div></td></tr></tbody></table></div><div class=\"col-lg-5\"> </div></div></div></div></div><div class=\"panel panel-default\"><div class=\"panel-heading\"><h4 id=\"Communication1-4\" class=\"panel-title\"><span style=\"float: right;\">Resource Conformance: SHALL </span>Communication</h4></div><div class=\"panel-body\"><div class=\"container\"><div class=\"row\"><div class=\"col-lg-4\"><span class=\"lead\">Core FHIR Resource</span><br/><a href=\"http://hl7.org/fhir/R4/communication.html\">Communication</a></div><div class=\"col-lg-4\"><span <code>read</code>, <code>create</code>, <code>delete</code>.</li></ul></div></div><p/><div class=\"row\"><div class=\"col-6\"><span class=\"lead\">Supported Profiles</span><p><a href=\"StructureDefinition-GEM-ERP-PR-Communication.html\">GEM ERP PR Communication</a><br/><a href=\"StructureDefinition-GEM-ERP-PR-Communication-DispReq.html\">GEM ERP PR Communication DispReq</a><br/><a href=\"StructureDefinition-GEM-ERP-PR-Communication-Reply.html\">GEM ERP PR Communication Reply</a><br/><a href=\"StructureDefinition-GEM-ERP-PR-Communication-Representative.html\">GEM ERP PR Communication Representative</a></p></div></div><p/><div class=\"row\"><div class=\"col-lg-7\"><span class=\"lead\">Search Parameters</span><table class=\"table table-condensed table-hover\"><thead><tr><th>Conformance</th><th>Parameter</th><th>Type</th><th>Documentation</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><b>SHALL</b></td><td><a href=\"http://hl7.org/fhir/R4/communication.html#search\">sent</a></td><td><code>date</code></td><td><div><p>Communication.sent - Unterstützt die Suche nach dem Sendedatum; default sort if _sort is not provided</p>\n</div></td></tr><tr><td><b>SHALL</b></td><td><a href=\"http://hl7.org/fhir/R4/communication.html#search\">received</a></td><td><code>date</code></td><td><div><p>Communication.received - Unterstützt die Suche nach dem Empfangsdatum</p>\n</div></td></tr><tr><td><b>SHALL</b></td><td><a href=\"http://hl7.org/fhir/R4/communication.html#search\">recipient</a></td><td><code>string</code></td><td><div><p>Communication.recipient.identifier.value - Unterstützt die Suche nach dem Empfänger einer Nachricht</p>\n</div></td></tr><tr><td><b>SHALL</b></td><td><a href=\"http://hl7.org/fhir/R4/communication.html#search\">sender</a></td><td><code>string</code></td><td><div><p>Communication.sender.identifier.value - Unterstützt die Suche nach dem Absender einer Nachricht</p>\n</div></td></tr><tr><td><b>SHALL</b></td><td>_sort</td><td><code>string</code></td><td><div><p>Unterstützt das Sortieren nach unterstützten Communication-Suchkriterien</p>\n</div></td></tr><tr><td><b>SHALL</b></td><td>_count</td><td><code>number</code></td><td><div><p>Maximale Anzahl zurückgegebener Einträge pro Seite; maximum value is 50</p>\n</div></td></tr><tr><td><b>SHALL</b></td><td>_offset</td><td><code>number</code></td><td><div><p>Nullbasierter Offset des ersten zurückgegebenen Eintrags; default is 0</p>\n</div></td></tr></tbody></table></div><div class=\"col-lg-5\"> </div></div></div></div></div><div class=\"panel panel-default\"><div class=\"panel-heading\"><h4 id=\"AuditEvent1-5\" class=\"panel-title\"><span style=\"float: right;\">Resource Conformance: SHALL </span>AuditEvent</h4></div><div class=\"panel-body\"><div class=\"container\"><div class=\"row\"><div class=\"col-lg-4\"><span class=\"lead\">Core FHIR Resource</span><br/><a href=\"http://hl7.org/fhir/R4/auditevent.html\">AuditEvent</a></div><div class=\"col-lg-4\"><span class=\"lead\">Reference <code>read</code>.</li></ul></div></div><p/><div class=\"row\"><div class=\"col-6\"><span class=\"lead\">Supported Profiles</span><p><a href=\"StructureDefinition-GEM-ERP-PR-AuditEvent.html\">GEM ERP PR AuditEvent</a></p></div></div><p/><div class=\"row\"><div class=\"col-lg-7\"><span class=\"lead\">Search Parameters</span><table class=\"table table-condensed table-hover\"><thead><tr><th>Conformance</th><th>Parameter</th><th>Type</th><th>Documentation</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><b>SHALL</b></td><td><a href=\"http://hl7.org/fhir/R4/auditevent.html#search\">date</a></td><td><code>date</code></td><td><div><p>AuditEvent.recorded - Unterstützt die Suche nach dem Aufzeichnungsdatum; default sort if _sort is not provided</p>\n</div></td></tr><tr><td><b>SHALL</b></td><td><a href=\"http://hl7.org/fhir/R4/auditevent.html#search\">entity</a></td><td><code>string</code></td><td><div><p>AuditEvent.entity.what.identifier.value - Unterstützt die Suche nach betroffenen Entitäten</p>\n</div></td></tr><tr><td><b>SHALL</b></td><td>_sort</td><td><code>string</code></td><td><div><p>Unterstützt das Sortieren nach unterstützten AuditEvent-Suchkriterien</p>\n</div></td></tr><tr><td><b>SHALL</b></td><td>_count</td><td><code>number</code></td><td><div><p>Maximale Anzahl zurückgegebener Einträge pro Seite; maximum value is 50</p>\n</div></td></tr><tr><td><b>SHALL</b></td><td>_offset</td><td><code>number</code></td><td><div><p>Nullbasierter Offset des ersten zurückgegebenen Eintrags; default is 0</p>\n</div></td></tr></tbody></table></div><div class=\"col-lg-5\"> </div></div></div></div></div><div class=\"panel panel-default\"><div class=\"panel-heading\"><h4 id=\"MedicationDispense1-6\" class=\"panel-title\"><span style=\"float: right;\">Resource Conformance: SHALL </span>MedicationDispense</h4></div><div class=\"panel-body\"><div class=\"container\"><div class=\"row\"><div class=\"col-lg-4\"><span class=\"lead\">Core FHIR Resource</span><br/><a href=\"http://hl7.org/fhir/R4/medicationdispense.html\">MedicationDispense</a></div><div class=\"col-lg-4\"><span class=\"lead\">Reference Policy</span><br/></div><div class=\"col-lg-4\"><span class=\"lead\">Interaction summary</span><br/><ul><li><strong>SHALL</strong> support <code>search-type</code>.</li></ul></div></div><p/><p/><div class=\"row\"><div class=\"col-lg-7\"><span class=\"lead\">Search Parameters</span><table class=\"table table-condensed table-hover\"><thead><tr><th>Conformance</th><th>Parameter</th><th>Type</th><th>Documentation</th></tr></thead><tbody><tr><td><b>SHALL</b></td><td><a href=\"http://hl7.org/fhir/R4/medicationdispense.html#search\">whenhandedover</a></td><td><code>date</code></td><td><div><p>MedicationDispense.whenHandedOver - Unterstützt die Suche nach dem Abgabedatum</p>\n</div></td></tr><tr><td><b>SHALL</b></td><td><a href=\"http://hl7.org/fhir/R4/medicationdispense.html#search\">whenprepared</a></td><td><code>date</code></td><td><div><p>MedicationDispense.whenPrepared - Unterstützt die Suche nach dem Herstellungsdatum</p>\n</div></td></tr><tr><td><b>SHALL</b></td><td><a href=\"http://hl7.org/fhir/R4/medicationdispense.html#search\">performer</a></td><td><code>string</code></td><td><div><p>MedicationDispense.performer.actor.identifier.value - Unterstützt die Suche einer MedicationDispense zu einer Abgebenden LEI.</p>\n</div></td></tr><tr><td><b>SHALL</b></td><td>identifier</td><td><code>token</code></td><td><div><p>MedicationDispense.identifier - Unterstützt die Suche nach einer MedicationDispense zu einem E-Rezept.</p>\n</div></td></tr><tr><td><b>SHALL</b></td><td>_sort</td><td><code>string</code></td><td><div><p>Unterstützt das Sortieren nach unterstützten MedicationDispense-Suchkriterien</p>\n</div></td></tr><tr><td><b>SHALL</b></td><td>_count</td><td><code>number</code></td><td><div><p>Maximale Anzahl zurückgegebener Einträge pro Seite; maximum value is 50</p>\n</div></td></tr><tr><td><b>SHALL</b></td><td>_offset</td><td><code>number</code></td><td><div><p>Nullbasierter Offset des ersten zurückgegebenen Eintrags; default is 0</p>\n</div></td></tr></tbody></table></div><div class=\"col-lg-5\"> </div></div></div></div></div><div class=\"panel panel-default\"><div class=\"panel-heading\"><h4 id=\"Device1-7\" class=\"panel-title\"><span style=\"float: right;\">Resource Conformance: SHALL </span>Device</h4></div><div class=\"panel-body\"><div class=\"container\"><div class=\"row\"><div class=\"col-lg-4\"><span class=\"lead\">Core FHIR Resource</span><br/><a href=\"http://hl7.org/fhir/R4/device.html\">Device</a></div><div class=\"col-lg-4\"><span class=\"lead\">Reference Policy</span><br/></div><div class=\"col-lg-4\"><span class=\"lead\">Interaction summary</span><br/><ul><li><strong>SHALL</strong> support <code>search-type</code>.</li></ul></div></div><p/><div class=\"row\"><div class=\"col-6\"><span class=\"lead\">Supported Profiles</span><p><a href=\"StructureDefinition-GEM-ERP-PR-Device.html\">GEM ERP PR Device</a></p></div></div><p/></div></div></div><div class=\"panel panel-default\"><div class=\"panel-heading\"><h4 id=\"Subscription1-8\" class=\"panel-title\"><span style=\"float: right;\">Resource Conformance: SHALL </span>Subscription</h4></div><div class=\"panel-body\"><div class=\"container\"><div class=\"row\"><div class=\"col-lg-4\"><span class=\"lead\">Core FHIR Resource</span><br/><a href=\"http://hl7.org/fhir/R4/subscription.html\">Subscription</a></div><div class=\"col-lg-4\"><span class=\"lead\">Reference Policy</span><br/></div><div class=\"col-lg-4\"><span class=\"lead\">Interaction summary</span><br/><ul><li><strong>SHALL</strong> support <code>search-type</code>, <code>create</code>.</li></ul></div></div><p/><p/></div></div></div></div>"^^rdf:XMLLiteral ]
  ] ; #

fhir:l <http://hl7.org/fhir/SearchParameter/Communication-sent>         ] ;
fhir:type [ fhir:v "date" ] ;
fhir:documentation [ fhir:v "Communication.sent - Unterstützt die Suche nach dem Sendedatum; default sort if _sort is not provided" ]       ] [
        ( fhir:extension [
fhir:url [
fhir:v "http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/capabilitystatement-expectation"^^xsd:anyURI ;

fhir:value [
a fhir:Code ;

fhir:value [
a fhir:Code ;
fhir:v "SHALL"           ]         ] ) ;
fhir:name [ fhir:v "_offset" ] ;

fhir:documentation [ fhir:v "Nullbasierter Offset des ersten zurückgegebenen Eintrags; default is 0" ]       ] )     ] [
